CVE-2019-12779.title: libqb before 1.0.5 allows local users to overwrite arbitrary file ...
CVE-2019-12779.description: libqb before 1.0.5 allows local users to overwrite arbitrary files via a symlink attack, because it uses predictable filenames (under /dev/shm and /tmp) without O_EXCL.

CVE-2023-39976.title: log_blackbox.c in libqb before 2.0.8 allows a buffer overflow via ...
CVE-2023-39976.description: log_blackbox.c in libqb before 2.0.8 allows a buffer overflow via long log messages because the header size is not considered.
